title: Azure Local Accreditation 2025
summary: This Learning Path introduces Azure Local, beginning with foundational concepts and progressing into the core technical principles of hyperconverged infrastructure. You’ll explore how Azure Local enables organizations to run virtualized workloads on-premises using tools and technologies that are familiar to IT professionals. This Learning Path also highlights key capabilities and deployment considerations to help you better understand how Azure Local fits into modern hybrid infrastructure strategies.

sections.title: Azure Local Accreditation 2025
sections.summary: This Learning Path introduces Azure Local, beginning with foundational concepts and progressing into the core technical principles of hyperconverged infrastructure. You’ll explore how Azure Local enables organizations to run virtualized workloads on-premises using tools and technologies that are familiar to IT professionals. This Learning Path also highlights key capabilities and deployment considerations to help you better understand how Azure Local fits into modern hybrid infrastructure strategies.

lessons.title: Introduction to Azure Local
lessons.content_md:
In this module, you’ll learn how Azure Local helps you run virtual machines on-premises using hyperconverged infrastructure. You’ll also discover how you can use Azure services for centralized management, monitoring, and backup.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-local/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Hyperconverged Infrastructure (HCI) Stack
lessons.content_md:
In this module, you'll learn how Azure Local functions, how it integrates with hybrid environments, and how deployment and management work using standard tools.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/hci-stack/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Hybrid cloud integration with Azure Local
lessons.content_md:
In this module, you'll learn how Azure Local enables organizations to run virtual machines, containers, and cloud services on-premises while integrating with Azure for centralized management and security. You'll explore technical features such as hybrid cloud connectivity, resource organization, automated updates, container orchestration with AKS, and multi-layered security protections.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/hybrid-cloud-integration-with-azure-local/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Hybrid cloud integration with Azure Local

lessons.title: Operate hybrid infrastructure with Azure Local
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to manage and operate hybrid infrastructure using Azure Local with familiar tools like Windows Admin Center, PowerShell, and Azure Arc.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/operate-hybrid-infrastructure-with-azure-local/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Operate hybrid infrastructure with Azure Local

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Azure Local Accreditation 2025
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Azure Local Accreditation 2025**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
